Off Calendar May-05-2010 Off Calendar

Ann Elyse Benard Linsky'S Probate Code Secions 15409 And 17200 Petition To Have The Court (1) Remove Gary Linsky As Trustee Fo The Trust; (2) Appoint A New Trustee Of The Trust; (3) Compel Gary Linsky To Turnover To New Trustee Assets Of The Trust; And (4) Surcharge Gary Linsky, As Appropriate, For Any Loss Or Damage To The Trust
Off Calendar Apr-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Skootsky for Gary Linsky (Trustee).

Mr. Skootsky stated that a responsive pleading would be filed by the end of the day. The matter will be taken under submission upon filing of said document.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Ann Elyse Benard Linsky'S Probate Code Secions 15409 And 17200 Petition To Have The Court (1) Remove Gary Linsky As Trustee Fo The Trust; (2) Appoint A New Trustee Of The Trust; (3) Compel Gary Linsky To Turnover To New Trustee Assets Of The Trust; And (4) Surcharge Gary Linsky, As Appropriate, For Any Loss Or Damage To The Trust
Off Calendar Mar-02-2010 Continued To Mar-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Skootsky for and with Gary Linsky. Peter Sprouls for and with Ann Linsky. Leonard Kully Successor Trustee in Propria Persona. Corey Birnberg interested Party also present.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Mr. Linsky being/not being removed as Trustee, inadequacy of the petition, conlfict, raised issues about the divorce matter, spoke of Ms. Linsky's increasing medical needs and stated that discovery still needed to be conducted. The matter was continued to March 16, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow Mr. Skootsky time to file his response. The matter will be taken under submission on that date. The Court will not entertain the issue regarding surcharge.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
